chapter goal: Why are rotations, roots, and conjugation geometric operations rather than only algebraic syntax?
computational checks: cross-ratio invariance under a projective reparametrization
join/meet incidence for generated homogeneous points
mode-specific conic or hyperbolic numeric check when relevant
gaps: Proof-heavy material in Chapter 16 is represented by complex diagrams, determinant/cross-ratio checks, or small parameter experiments rather than copied text.
